data_scope.resolution_basis: W2-09 source and its earlier packet resolve repo-relative runs/e2_ext_cubicasa; the newer packet's D:/runs spelling is absent

candidate_features.name: junction_neighbor_degree_sum
candidate_features.definition: sum of exact W2-09 junction degrees over the focal segment's exact junction neighbors

candidate_features.name: junction_neighbor_degree_max
candidate_features.definition: maximum exact W2-09 junction degree among exact junction neighbors

candidate_features.name: junction_neighbor_degree_variance
candidate_features.definition: population variance of exact W2-09 junction degrees among exact junction neighbors

candidate_features.name: twohop_parallel_count
candidate_features.definition: count in exact midpoint-radius graph distance-2 ring meeting W2-09 angle, overlap, and frozen thickness-band gap conditions relative to self

candidate_features.name: twohop_parallel_gap_min_px
candidate_features.definition: minimum perpendicular gap among qualifying second-ring parallel segments

candidate_features.name: twohop_parallel_gap_mean_px
candidate_features.definition: mean perpendicular gap among qualifying second-ring parallel segments

candidate_features.name: twohop_parallel_gap_std_px
candidate_features.definition: population standard deviation of perpendicular gaps among qualifying second-ring parallel segments

candidate_features.name: twohop_parallel_gap_max_px
candidate_features.definition: maximum perpendicular gap among qualifying second-ring parallel segments

candidate_features.name: junction_component_size
candidate_features.definition: number of segments in the focal segment's undirected exact-junction connected component

candidate_features.name: junction_component_thickness_rate
candidate_features.definition: fraction of component segments with frozen base thickness evidence greater than zero

candidate_features.name: twohop_ring_count
candidate_features.definition: number of segments at exact graph distance two in the 20px midpoint-radius graph

candidate_features.name: twohop_length_mean_px
candidate_features.definition: mean segment length in the exact distance-2 ring

candidate_features.name: twohop_length_std_px
candidate_features.definition: population standard deviation of segment length in the exact distance-2 ring

candidate_features.name: twohop_length_max_px
candidate_features.definition: maximum segment length in the exact distance-2 ring

candidate_features.name: twohop_angle_alignment_mean
candidate_features.definition: mean cosine of undirected angle difference to self over the exact distance-2 ring

candidate_features.name: twohop_angle_alignment_std
candidate_features.definition: population standard deviation of cosine angle alignment over the exact distance-2 ring

candidate_features.name: twohop_angle_aligned_fraction_2deg
candidate_features.definition: fraction of exact distance-2 ring segments with undirected angle difference at most 2 degrees

candidate_features.name: collinear_extension_chain_length_px_le2
candidate_features.definition: maximum projected span of a simple collinear-extension path starting at self with at most two edges; each edge has angle difference at most 2 degrees, support-line offset at most frozen snap tolerance, and endpoint distance at most 20px

fit_protocol.seed_aggregation: arithmetic mean of the three per-seed metrics

arms.difference: only the sealed two-hop feature columns

comparison_target.name: protocol-matched clean incumbent
comparison_target.rule: retrain the frozen context12 estimator configuration on train only; do not score the supplied train+val-A artifact on its own fit rows

bootstrap.resampling: multinomial draw of family_count families with replacement
bootstrap.seed_aggregation: same family multiplicities for both arms and all seeds; average per-seed metric within each replicate before arm subtraction

feature_importance.definition: sum positive internal-node gain by feature across every tree; aggregate raw gain over three full-arm seed models

selftest.determinism: two independent feature calculations; volatile fields runtime and timestamps excluded; all numeric fields identical
selftest.label_leakage: shuffle labels and verify feature matrix unchanged

frozen.judgment_policy: numeric outputs only; no adoption or rejection verdict
frozen.optional_w2_01: quote lowest-family deltas only if the declared W2-01 artifact exists; otherwise record unavailable and continue
